# DoReDog — Piano Letter Notes

> DoReDog is a free, ad-supported library of **piano letter notes** (2417 public-domain pieces across 429 composers) with a built-in live in-browser player. Read the letters, press play, and hear the melody while a colour-coded keyboard lights up. Every piece is playable at doredog.com — no sheet music, no sign-up.

## What "letter notes" mean (so you can read/cite the notation)

Music is written as letters instead of sheet music:
- Lowercase `c d e f g a b` = the seven white keys; the pattern repeats each octave.
- An **uppercase** letter is the black key just to its right (a sharp): `C`=C#, `D`=D#, `F`=F#, `G`=G#, `A`=A#.
- A leading number is the octave (middle C = `c4`). A dash `-` holds the note or is a rest; spacing = timing.
- Lines are tagged `RH` (right hand) / `LH` (left hand); stacked lines play together.

## Key pages

- [Library — browse all 2417 pieces](https://doredog.com/library)
- [How to read letter notes (guide)](https://doredog.com/guide)
- [Learn letter notes in 5 steps](https://doredog.com/learn)
- [Online piano](https://doredog.com/piano)
- [Music-history timeline](https://doredog.com/timeline)

## Popular pieces (each plays live in the browser)

- [Für Elise — Ludwig van Beethoven](https://doredog.com/song?id=fur-elise)
- [Moonlight Sonata — 1st Movement — Ludwig van Beethoven](https://doredog.com/song?id=moonlight-sonata)
- [Moonlight Sonata — 3rd Movement — Ludwig van Beethoven](https://doredog.com/song?id=moonlight-3)
- [Clair de Lune — Claude Debussy](https://doredog.com/song?id=clair-de-lune)
- [The Entertainer — Scott Joplin](https://doredog.com/song?id=the-entertainer)
- [Maple Leaf Rag — Scott Joplin](https://doredog.com/song?id=maple-leaf-rag)
- [Ode to Joy — Ludwig van Beethoven](https://doredog.com/song?id=ode-to-joy)
- [Rondo Alla Turca — Turkish March — W. A. Mozart](https://doredog.com/song?id=rondo-alla-turca)
- [Gymnopédie No. 1 — Erik Satie](https://doredog.com/song?id=gymnopedie-no-1)
- [Gnossienne No. 1 — Erik Satie](https://doredog.com/song?id=gnossienne-no-1)
- [Canon in D — Johann Pachelbel](https://doredog.com/song?id=canon-in-d)
- [Prelude in C (WTC I) — J. S. Bach](https://doredog.com/song?id=prelude-in-c)
- [Fantaisie-Impromptu (Op. 66) — Frédéric Chopin](https://doredog.com/song?id=fantaisie-impromptu)
- [Nocturne Op. 9 No. 2 — Frédéric Chopin](https://doredog.com/song?id=nocturne-op-9-no-2)
- [Flight of the Bumblebee — N. Rimsky-Korsakov](https://doredog.com/song?id=flight-of-the-bumblebee)
- [Hungarian Dance No. 5 — Johannes Brahms](https://doredog.com/song?id=hungarian-dance-5)
- [Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star — W. A. Mozart](https://doredog.com/song?id=twinkle-twinkle)
- [Air on the G String — J. S. Bach](https://doredog.com/song?id=air-on-the-g-string)
- [Waltz Op. 64 No. 1 “Minute” — Frédéric Chopin](https://doredog.com/song?id=minute-waltz)
- [Prelude Op. 28 No. 15 “Raindrop” — Frédéric Chopin](https://doredog.com/song?id=raindrop-prelude)

- [J. S. Bach (374 pieces)](https://doredog.com/composer?name=J.%20S.%20Bach)

## Notes

All content is public-domain classical/traditional music or original DoReDog arrangements. Contact: mnkahraman@gmail.com
